name: Tabouli Herb Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Green bell pepper, seeded and finely chopped
1/2 Head romaine lettuce (washed, dried, and leaves separated)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the olive oil, lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Whisk together.
2. Set the dressing aside.
3. Rinse the bulgur in cold water and squeeze out excess water using a strainer.
4. In a medium bowl, mix the rinsed bulgur with parsley, mint, garlic, tomatoes, scallions, onions, and green bell peppers.
5. Toss the ingredients well.
6. Add the dressing to the bowl and toss everything together until evenly coated.
7. Arrange individual servings of romaine lettuce on plates.
8. Place the tabouli salad on top of each serving of lettuce.
